/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/c/Users/samca/openfhenvdia-gpu/build CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/src/test_dag.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/src/fhe_compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/src/cuda_hal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/src/twiddle_gen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/src/vram_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/src/gpu_keyswitch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/src/gpu_evalmult_p34.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/kernels/cuda_math.cu.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/kernels/cuda_ntt.cu.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/kernels/cuda_keyswitch.cu.o CMakeFiles/test_dag.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o test_dag   -L/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
